en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO DO NOT DESTROY. A MIKTAM OF DAVID, WHEN SAUL SENT MEN TO WATCH HIS HOUSE IN ORDER TO KILL HIM. Deliver me from my enemies, O my God; protect me from those who rise up against me;
zh: 我的 神啊！求你救我脫離我的仇敵， 求你把我安放在高處，脫離那些起來攻擊我的人。

en: deliver me from those who work evil, and save me from bloodthirsty men.
zh: 求你救我脫離作孽的人， 救我脫離流人血的人。

en: For behold, they lie in wait for my life; fierce men stir up strife against me. For no transgression or sin of mine, O LORD,
zh: 看哪！他們埋伏要害我的性命； 強盛的人聚集起來攻擊我； 耶和華啊！這不是因我的過犯， 也不是因我的罪惡。

en: for no fault of mine, they run and make ready. Awake, come to meet me, and see!
zh: 我雖然沒有過錯， 他們還是跑來，預備好攻擊我。 求你醒來，幫助我，鑒察我。

en: You, LORD God of hosts, are God of Israel. Rouse yourself to punish all the nations; spare none of those who treacherously plot evil. Selah
zh: 萬軍的 神耶和華啊！你是以色列的 神， 求你醒來，懲罰萬國； 求你不要恩待那些背信棄義的惡人。

en: Each evening they come back, howling like dogs and prowling about the city.
zh: 他們每晚都回來， 好像狗一樣狂吠， 環繞著城行走。

en: There they are, bellowing with their mouths with swords in their lips- for "Who," they think, "will hear us?"
zh: 看哪！他們口中吐出惡言， 他們嘴裡吐出利刀， 他們心裡說：“有誰聽見呢？”

en: But you, O LORD, laugh at them; you hold all the nations in derision.
zh: 但你耶和華必譏笑他們， 你必嗤笑萬國。

en: O my Strength, I will watch for you, for you, O God, are my fortress.
zh: 我的力量啊！我要仰望你， 神啊！因為你是我的高臺。

en: My God in his steadfast love will meet me; God will let me look in triumph on my enemies.
zh: 我的 神必以慈愛迎接我； 神必叫我看見我的仇敵遭報。

en: Kill them not, lest my people forget; make them totter by your power and bring them down, O Lord, our shield!
zh: 不要殺害他們，免得我的人民忘記了； 主啊！你是我們的盾牌， 求你用你的能力，使他們飄流無定， 並且降為卑微。

en: For the sin of their mouths, the words of their lips, let them be trapped in their pride. For the cursing and lies that they utter,
zh: 因他們口中的罪， 因他們嘴裡所說的話， 願他們在自己的驕傲中被纏住。 因他們所說的是咒罵和欺騙的話，

en: consume them in wrath; consume them till they are no more, that they may know that God rules over Jacob to the ends of the earth. Selah
zh: 求你在怒中消滅他們， 消滅他們，以致無一倖免， 好使他們知道 神在雅各中間掌權， 直到地極。

en: Each evening they come back, howling like dogs and prowling about the city.
zh: 他們每晚都回來， 好像狗一樣狂吠， 環繞著城行走。

en: They wander about for food and growl if they do not get their fill.
zh: 他們四處飄流，尋找食物； 如果得不到飽足，就不斷咆哮。

en: But I will sing of your strength; I will sing aloud of your steadfast love in the morning. For you have been to me a fortress and a refuge in the day of my distress.
zh: 至於我，我要歌頌你的能力， 每天早晨我要向你的慈愛歡呼， 因為你作了我的高臺， 在患難的日子，作了我的避難所。

en: O my Strength, I will sing praises to you, for you, O God, are my fortress, the God who shows me steadfast love.
zh: 我的力量啊！我要向你歌唱； 神啊！你是我的高臺， 是向我施慈愛的 神。
